text: 20. SUB-SUBCONTRACTOR: Subcontractor  must  submit  to  Contractor  for  approval  all  his  proposed  subcontractors  and  subsubcontractors, and Contractor may reject any proposed subcontractor or sub-subcontractor. Approval of a subcontractor or subsubcontractor  will  not  imply  that  Contractor  assumes  any  responsibility  for  such  subcontractor  or  sub-subcontractor,  or  that Subcontractor is relieved of any responsibility with respect to the sublet work. Before final payment will be made, Subcontractor shall furnish Contractor a list of all of subcontractors, sub-subcontractors and suppliers who furnished any labor or materials for the work, in the form attached hereto as Exhibit 'D' and incorporated herein.
